programme.title: The Happytime Murders
programme.desc: Two detectives -- one human and the other a puppet -- work together to find a killer in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Kill Room
programme.desc: An art dealer teams up with a hit man and his boss for a money-laundering scheme.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A dead man is thought to be a victim of a hit-and-run accident; a mother requests an autopsy.

programme.title: Operation: Endgame
programme.desc: After a rogue agent murders their boss, rival spies target one another for death.

programme.title: The BeastMaster
programme.desc: A psychic (Marc Singer) saves a slave girl (Tanya Roberts) from a sorcerer (Rip Torn).

programme.title: Bridge of Dragons
programme.desc: A man helps a rebel princess overthrow the evil general who killed her father and seized the throne.

programme.title: Marlowe
programme.desc: Detective Phillip Marlowe becomes embroiled in an investigation with a wealthy family.

programme.title: End Game
programme.desc: A Secret Service agent (Cuba Gooding Jr.) investigates a presidential assassination.

programme.title: Naked Singularity
programme.desc: An idealistic public defender, burned out by the system, is drawn into a drug heist by an ex-client.

programme.title: The 51st State
programme.desc: A chemist (Samuel L. Jackson) goes to England for one last deal before retiring.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A dead man is thought to be a victim of a hit-and-run accident; a mother requests an autopsy.

programme.title: Blue Iguana
programme.desc: Two parolees think their lives are at a dead end until they get an offer they can't refuse.

programme.title: The Happytime Murders
programme.desc: Two detectives -- one human and the other a puppet -- work together to find a killer in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Matrix Revolutions
programme.desc: Neo, Morpheus and Trinity prepare for a final battle against vicious machines set to invade Zion.

programme.title: The Matrix Revolutions
programme.desc: Neo, Morpheus and Trinity prepare for a final battle against vicious machines set to invade Zion.

programme.title: Kung Fu Hustle
programme.desc: KUNG FU HUSTLE perfectly blends original comedy and explosive martial arts action. Creative and imaginative characters slam together in a comic blend of Quentin Tarantino meets Jackie Chan in a film that goes beyond the limits of mere comedy.

programme.title: The Legend
programme.desc: This Hong Kong martial-arts extravaganza tells of evil emperors and true love. The secret Red Lotus Flower Society is committed to the overthrow of the evil Manchu Emperor and his minions.

programme.title: The Legend of Fong Sai-Yuk 2
programme.desc: The Cantonese hero Fong Sai Yuk becomes involved in the secret brotherhood "The Red Flower", who are trying to overthrow the Manchurian emperor and re-establishing the Ming dynasty.

programme.title: Willy's Wonderland
programme.desc: A loner wages war against the possessed animatronic mascots of Willy's Wonderland.

programme.title: Mafia
programme.desc: A detective (Pam Grier) vows to bring a thug (Ving Rhames) and his gang to justice.

programme.title: Ninja
programme.desc: An American ninja (Scott Adkins) must prevent yakuza from obtaining weapons.

programme.title: Ninja II: Shadow of a Tear
programme.desc: A martial-arts master hones his battle skills so that he can avenge his wife's murder.

programme.title: City of Industry
programme.desc: Retired thief (Harvey Keitel) joins brother for a final heist.

programme.title: Code Name Banshee
programme.desc: A former assassin and his protégé fight the CIA-backed killers coming to claim a bounty on his life.

programme.title: Bangkok Dangerous
programme.desc: On assignment in Thailand, a hit man, instead, mentors a street punk and woos a local shop girl.

programme.title: The Gunman
programme.desc: A former Special Forces soldier (Sean Penn) who suffers from PTSD goes on the run to clear his name.

programme.title: Man of Tai Chi
programme.desc: A young martial artist's amazing skills in tai chi grant him entry into an underworld fight club.

programme.title: Kung Fu Hustle
programme.desc: KUNG FU HUSTLE perfectly blends original comedy and explosive martial arts action. Creative and imaginative characters slam together in a comic blend of Quentin Tarantino meets Jackie Chan in a film that goes beyond the limits of mere comedy.

programme.title: Kung Fu Hustle
programme.desc: KUNG FU HUSTLE perfectly blends original comedy and explosive martial arts action. Creative and imaginative characters slam together in a comic blend of Quentin Tarantino meets Jackie Chan in a film that goes beyond the limits of mere comedy.

programme.title: 88 Minutes
programme.desc: A forensic psychiatrist (Al Pacino) has less than 90 minutes to find the source of a death threat.
